name: Wiki
description: Create, edit, and organize a Markdown knowledge base.
author: Moldable

capabilities.name: Wiki RPC
capabilities.description: Read, search, edit, and organize the active Markdown wiki vault.

scopes.name: Read wiki
scopes.description: List vault contents, read notes, search, inspect backlinks, health, templates, settings, and properties.

scopes.name: Edit wiki
scopes.description: Create, update, move, delete, restore, and template notes and folders.

scopes.name: Edit properties
scopes.description: Set, delete, rename, reorder, and change types for frontmatter properties.

scopes.name: Manage vaults
scopes.description: Create, switch, update, bootstrap, configure, and delete wiki vaults.

tagline: A linked, local-first Markdown knowledge base
